top_signals.title: Israeli Forces Fired Shots at Gaza Flotilla
top_signals.summary: Israeli forces opened fire on at least two vessels in an aid flotilla sailing towards Gaza on Tuesday, according to video footage and flotilla organisers, but Israel said no live ammunition was used and there were no casualties.The flotilla…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Palm Oil Stocks Drop on Indonesia Plan to Tighten Export Control
top_signals.summary: Indonesian palm oil producer stocks tumbled on the prospect of tighter state control over commodity exports in Southeast Asia’s largest economy.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Putin and Xi to discuss huge gas project at China summit
top_signals.summary: Talks on Power of Siberia 2 pipeline come just days after Donald Trump’s visit to Beijing
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Singapore Tops Indonesia as Biggest Southeast Asia Stock Market
top_signals.summary: Singapore has taken over Indonesia as Southeast Asia’s largest stock market, signaling investors’ endorsement of the city-state’s market reforms and their diminishing confidence in its neighbor’s economic management.

top_signals.title: Opening speech by President von der Leyen at the European Clean Tech Conference, via video message
